themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 3 verses. Commentary leans on "What does God's promise to 'dwell among you' mean for your daily life?". Word-study detail reinforces "אֵלֶ֖יךָ: - near, with or among; often in general, to".
